ddls:
CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "area_1" TEXT /* First area in the connection */,
  "area_2" TEXT /* Second area in the connection */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength of the connection (logarithmic function of FLNe value) */,
  "same_community" INTEGER /* Whether the two areas belong to the same community */,
  "shortest_path" INTEGER /* Whether the shortest path between the two areas has been identified */,
  "distance" REAL /* Physical distance between the two areas */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the connection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_area_1 FOREIGN KEY ("area_1") REFERENCES areas ("area_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_area_2 FOREIGN KEY ("area_2") REFERENCES areas ("area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community-area pair */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community-area relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community-area relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_areas_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_areas_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortest_paths" (
  "shortest_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shortest path */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection */,
  "path" TEXT /* Shortest path between the two areas */,
  "path_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the shortest path */,
  "path_strength" REAL /* Total strength of the shortest path */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shortest path was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shortest path was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shortest_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortest_paths_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the network update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the network update was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the network update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_updates_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_updates" (
  "community_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community update */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., merge, split) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the community update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community update was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the community update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_updates_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., network topology, community structure) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
